title: The Curse of the Cheese Pyramid
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo is sent to Egypt to report on the pyramids and meets a wacky professor with a smelly secret invention! 🐫

q.en: What is the name of the newspaper that Geronimo Stilton runs?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩·斯蒂顿经营的报纸叫什么名字？

options.en: Mouse Island Times according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 《鼠岛时报》（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Geronimo says he runs a newspaper called The Rodent's Gazette, the most popular paper on Mouse Island.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩说他自己经营一家报纸，名叫《鼠民公报》，是鼠岛上最受欢迎的报纸。

q.en: What is Geronimo's grandfather William Shortpaws also known as?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩的爷爷威廉·肖特波斯的绰号是什么？

explain.en: The book calls him 'also known as Cheap Mouse Willy' because he is always trying to save money.
explain.zh: 书中称他为“绰号小气鼠威利”，因为他总是想方设法省钱。

q.en: Why did Grandfather send Geronimo far away to Egypt?
q.zh: 爷爷为什么把杰罗尼摩派到遥远的埃及去？

options.en: To learn how to fly a plane
To visit his cousin Trap according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 去探望他的表哥特拉普（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: To buy him a new carpet
To do a special report on the pyramids
options.zh: 去写一份关于金字塔的特别报道

explain.en: Grandfather gave Geronimo a plane ticket and said, 'You're going to Egypt to do a special report on the pyramids!'
explain.zh: 爷爷把飞机票塞到他鼻子底下说：“你要去埃及写一份关于金字塔的特别报道！”

q.en: What cheap airline did Geronimo fly to Egypt on?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩坐的是哪家便宜的航空公司去埃及？

options.en: Royal Rodent Airways according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 皇家老鼠航空（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: At the airport the agent says 'DCA Airlines? You mean Dirt Cheap Airlines?' — that is the airline Geronimo flew.
explain.zh: 在机场，工作人员说“DCA航空？你是说超便宜航空吧？”——杰罗尼摩坐的就是这家航空公司。

q.en: Who was the strange undertaker Geronimo met on the plane?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩在飞机上遇到的那个奇怪的殡葬员是谁？

options.en: Trap Stilton according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 特拉普·斯蒂顿（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The odd mouse dressed in purple with a black wig introduces himself as Daniel E. Deadfur, an undertaker.
explain.zh: 那个穿紫色衣服、戴黑色假发的古怪老鼠自我介绍说是丹尼尔·E·死毛，一名殡葬员。

q.en: What raw material did Professor Spitfur use to make energy?
q.zh: 斯皮特福教授用来制造能量的主要原料是什么？

explain.en: The professor whispers that the raw material he uses to produce energy is camel dung, fermented with a secret ingredient.
explain.zh: 教授小声说，他用来制造能量的原料是骆驼粪，再配上一种秘密配料发酵而成。

q.en: Where did Professor Spitfur get the idea for his secret ingredient?
q.zh: 斯皮特福教授是从哪里得到秘密配料的灵感的？

options.en: From a dream about a cat
From the ancient writing inside Cheops's pyramid
options.zh: 来自胡夫金字塔内部的古代文字

options.en: From a cookbook Trap gave him according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 来自特拉普给他的烹饪书（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The professor says he got the idea from the ancient hieroglyphs (the eye of Ra) inside Cheops's pyramid.
explain.zh: 教授说他是从胡夫金字塔内部的古代象形文字（拉神的眼睛）中获得灵感的。

q.en: How did Geronimo return home from Egypt?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩是怎么从埃及回家的？

options.en: On a cargo ship called the Dynamiter
options.zh: 坐一艘叫“炸药号”的货船

options.en: By riding a camel all the way according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 一路骑骆驼回去（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Grandfather made him come back by boat, and he sailed home on a cargo ship packed with explosives called the Dynamiter.
explain.zh: 爷爷让他坐船回来，于是他乘坐一艘装满炸药的货船“炸药号”回到了家。

q.en: Who was the captain of the cargo ship the Dynamiter?
q.zh: 货船“炸药号”的船长是谁？

options.en: Captain Ted Simplesnout according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 泰德·简单鼻船长（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The ship's captain was a rodent named Squeaky Kaboom, but everyone called him Boom for short.
explain.zh: 船长是只叫吱吱·卡彭的老鼠，大家都简称他为“轰”。

q.en: What did Geronimo and his family say to seal their plan against Grandfather?
q.zh: 杰罗尼摩和家人为了定下对付爷爷的计划，说了哪句口号？

options.en: Cheese forever! Rats never! according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 奶酪万岁！老鼠滚蛋！（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: To seal Operation Rodent Freedom, they twisted their tails together and squeaked, 'Friends together! Mice forever!'
explain.zh: 为了启动“老鼠自由行动”，他们把尾巴缠在一起喊道：“朋友同心！老鼠一家亲！”
